full_text:
Received a small (approx. 2 x 1 cm) tumor piece. Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. Resuspended the pellet in 1 ml for counting.

Cell counts:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 1.23 E6

live: 0.0945 E6

viability: 7.7 %

size: 9.1 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 1.08 E6

live: 0.390 E6

viability: 36.3 %

size: 10.6 um

Average cell count/ml: 1.155 E6 cells/ml

Total cell count: 1.155 E6 cells

Total volume: 1 mL

Freezing

1 cryotube containing all cells were frozen (approx. 1.2 E6 cells). Cells were resuspended in 1 ml Stem Cell Banker, and transferred to a cryotube.
